title: lobelia pusilla
intro: Lobelia pusilla, also known as small blue lobelia or dwarf lobelia, is a flowering plant species in the family Campanulaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been attributed to the presence of alkaloids such as lobeline. The health benefits associated with Lobelia pusilla include relief from respiratory issues like bronchitis and asthma, as well as potential anti-anxiety and anti-depressive effects. In herbal preparations, Lobelia pusilla is often combined with other herbs to create teas, tinctures, and infusions that are used to promote relaxation and ease respiratory congestion.
